returns.notSatisfiedNoProblem: Not satisfied? No problem! We make returns easy.
returns.swapForDifferentSizeOrColor: Swap for a different size or colour
returns.contactUsDescription: Email us at returns@adventureworks.ca or call (555) 123-4567 to initiate your return.
returns.packItUpDescription: Securely pack the item in its original packaging with all tags and accessories.
returns.shipItBackDescription: Use the prepaid shipping label we provide or ship via your preferred carrier.
returns.getRefundedDescription: Once inspected, refunds are processed within 5-7 business days to your original payment method.
returns.itemsReturnedWithin30Days: B Items returned within 30 days of delivery
returns.bikeReturnsDescription: Bikes may be returned within 14 days of delivery if unassembled and in original packaging. Assembled bikes are subject to a 15% restocking fee. Please contact us for special arrangements.
returns.exchangeDescription: Need a different size or colour? Exchanges are free and easy! Just mention 2exchange2 when you contact us and we�27ll ship your new item as soon as we receive your return.
returns.exchangeNote: Note: Exchanges are subject to availability. If your preferred item is out of stock, we�27ll process a full refund instead.
returns.supportDescription: Our customer support team is here to help! Reach out to us and we�27ll get back to you within 24 hours.

faq.howLongDoesShippingTakeAnswer: Standard shipping typically takes 3-5 business days within continental Canada. Expedited shipping (1-2 business days) is available at checkout for an additional fee. International orders may take 7-14 business days depending on the destination.
faq.doYouOfferFreeShippingAnswer: Yes! We offer free standard shipping on all orders over $75. Orders under $75 have a flat rate shipping fee of $7.99.
faq.canIChangeOrCancelMyOrder: Can I change or cancel my order?
faq.canIChangeOrCancelMyOrderAnswer: You can modify or cancel your order within 1 hour of placing it. After that, orders enter our fulfilment process and cannot be changed. Please contact us immediately if you need to make changes.
faq.howDoITrackMyOrder: How do I track my order?
faq.howDoITrackMyOrderAnswer: Once your order ships, you�27ll receive a confirmation email with tracking information. You can also track your order anytime by visiting the Order Tracking page in your account.
faq.whatIsYourReturnPolicyAnswer: We offer a 30-day return policy for unused items in original packaging. Bikes must be unassembled and returned within 14 days. See our full Returns Policy page for details.
faq.howDoIStartAReturn: How do I start a return?
faq.howDoIStartAReturnAnswer: Contact our support team at returns@adventureworks.ca or call (555) 123-4567. We�27ll provide a prepaid shipping label and guide you through the process.
faq.whenWillIReceiveMyRefund: When will I receive my refund?
faq.whenWillIReceiveMyRefundAnswer: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive and inspect your return. The refund will be credited to your original payment method.
faq.canIExchangeAnItemForDifferentSize: Can I exchange an item for a different size?
faq.canIExchangeAnItemForDifferentSizeAnswer: Absolutely! Exchanges are free. Just mention 2exchange2 when contacting us and specify the size or colour you need. We�27ll ship the new item as soon as we receive your return.
faq.howDoIChooseRightBikeSize: How do I choose the right bike size?
faq.howDoIChooseRightBikeSizeAnswer: Bike sizing depends on your height and inseam length. Generally: 5702-5742 = XS/S, 5742-5782 = S/M, 5782-6702 = M/L, 6702-6742 = L/XL. Check the product page for specific sizing charts or contact us for personalised advice.
faq.areYourBikesFullyAssembledAnswer: Bikes ship 85% assembled to ensure safe transport. You�27ll need to attach the front wheel, handlebars, pedals, and seat. Basic tools and instructions are included. We also offer professional assembly at select locations.
faq.doYouOfferAWarrantyAnswer: Yes! All bikes come with a 2-year warranty on frames and a 1-year warranty on components. Accessories and clothing have a 90-day warranty against manufacturing defects.
faq.whatIfAnItemIsOutOfStock: What if an item is out of stock?
faq.whatIfAnItemIsOutOfStockAnswer: You can sign up for notifications on the product page to be alerted when it�27s back in stock. Popular items typically restock within 2-4 weeks.
faq.whatPaymentMethodsDoYouAccept: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.whatPaymentMethodsDoYouAcceptAnswer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover), PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. We also offer financing through Affirm for orders over $150.
faq.isMyPaymentInformationSecureAnswer: Absolutely. We use industry-standard SSL encryption and never store your complete credit card information. All transactions are processed through secure, PCI-compliant payment providers.
faq.doINeedAnAccountToPlaceOrder: Do I need an account to place an order?
faq.doINeedAnAccountToPlaceOrderAnswer: No, you can checkout as a guest. However, creating an account lets you track orders, save your wishlist, and checkout faster on future purchases.
faq.howDoIResetMyPassword: How do I reset my password?
faq.howDoIResetMyPasswordAnswer: Click 2Sign In2 then 2Forgot Password2 and enter your email address. We�27ll send you a link to reset your password. The link expires in 24 hours for security.
faq.ourFriendlySupportTeam: Our friendly support team is here to help!
